name: Grayscale XRP Trust ETF
business: The Trust holds XRP and issues Shares in blocks of 10,000 Shares (Baskets) to Authorized Participants to provide investment exposure to XRP.
sellsTo: Secondary market investors on NYSE Arca

exposures.sentence: The Trust holds XRP and, from time to time on a periodic basis, issues Creation Baskets in exchange for deposits of XRP.
XRP faces competition from a wide range of digital assets.
Prices of XRP may be affected due to stablecoins (including Tether and USDC), the activities of stablecoin issuers and their regulatory treatment.
Competition from central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) and emerging payments initiatives involving financial institutions could adversely affect the price of XRP and other digital assets.

catalysts.event: Expiration of Sponsor's Fee waiver period
catalysts.sentence: Effective November 24, 2025, the Sponsor has determined to waive a portion of the Sponsor's Fee until the earlier of (x) February 25, 2026 and (y) the first date on which the NAV of the Trust exceeds $1.0 billion.
